findingDetails.title: Concurrent refreshes can lose a generation/policy update
findingDetails.description: Refresh writes are not serialized and have no concurrent-refresh regression test.

findingDetails.title: Completion status conflicts with required packet gates
findingDetails.description: Completion claims conflict with open required evidence and sign-off.

findingDetails.title: SD-015 limitation and follow-up are stale
findingDetails.description: The named SD-015 positive and adversarial tests exist.

findingDetails.title: Default-on cohort is maintained in multiple independently edited sources
findingDetails.description: Cohort literals are duplicated and equality-tested rather than generated.

noveltyJustification: Final convergence found no new issue after iteration 5; four substantive findings remain, with one reducer artifact resolved.
